title: eragrostis scabriflora
intro: Eragrostis scabriflora, also known as roughflower lovegrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Eragrostis scabriflora can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
